title: Core
overview: Abby knows the world is not fair enough to let her good fortune fall on her lap, so she works hard and takes pride in her success...until it all comes crashing down one Monday morning. Abby tries to build herself back up in an unforgiving world and rediscovers a relationship she has neglected for far too long.
